item.title: Spit Rituals @spit_rituals is a jewellery project exploring form, material, and ...
item.description:
🎬 Video

@di_spit

Spit Rituals @spit_rituals is a jewellery project exploring form, material, and memory.
Each piece is handmade in sterling 925 silver and produced as a single edition — shaped and finished by hand.

You can view the items on the website linked in bio.
For orders and questions, feel free to DM.

▶️ Åbn video direkte · se på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🎬 Video

@di_spit

Spit Rituals @spit_rituals is a jewellery project exploring form, material, and memory.
Each piece is handmade in sterling 925 silver and produced as a single edition — shaped and finished by hand.

You can view the items on the website linked in bio.
For orders and questions, feel free to DM.
